title: Hexcasting Media Display
description: A mod that shows how much media you have in your inventory (in amethyst dust)
body:
This mod is no long updated, I recommed https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting-media-display

A mod that adds text above the hot bar that shows how much media you have in your inventory in units of amethyst dust. Useful for hexcasting to know how much media you have so you don't die.
